distilleries.name: Cantine Florio - Historic Marsala Cellars
distilleries.description: Italy's most celebrated Marsala producer since 1833; tufa-stone cellars with 3,000-plus oak barrels; guided cellar tours are essentially a living fortified-wine museum attracting 50,000-plus visitors annually.
distilleries.tip: The 35-EUR guided tour includes the history of the Florio dynasty, cellar access and a tasting flight.

distilleries.name: Cantine Pellegrino - Historic Cellars
distilleries.description: Seven-generation family winery since 1880 with over 1,000 vats and barrels in historic cellars; tours reveal Punic archaeological finds, a Sicilian cart museum, master cooper workshop and plaster casts of a Punic ship.
distilleries.tip: The Ouverture tasting room has views of the Egadi Islands; request the Vergine Riserva in the guided flight.

distilleries.name: Donnafugata Historic Marsala Cellars
distilleries.description: 1851 industrial-archaeology baglio cellars with underground barrique room; the cellar architecture has been compared to Istanbul's Basilica Cistern; guided tours covering Marsala production and the estate's five Sicilian territories.
spirits_produced: Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC
distilleries.tip: The underground barrique cellar is the architectural highlight; the Iconic Wine Library experience at EUR 55 is worth the premium.

distilleries.name: Marco De Bartoli - Samperi Cellar
distilleries.address: Contrada Samperi, Mazara del Vallo Road, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily
distilleries.description: The iconic revival cellar for pre-British Marsala tradition; Vecchio Samperi is produced by solera-style decanting from multiple vintages without fortification; a benchmark for authentic historical Marsala technique.
distilleries.tip: The cellar that saved traditional Marsala; book well ahead as group size is limited to 25.

distilleries.name: Cantine Intorcia
distilleries.description: Family winery founded in 1930 covering 25,000 square metres; specialises in Marsala DOC and dessert wines (Zibibbo, Moscato, Malvasia); member of the Consorzio Volontario per la Tutela del Vino Marsala.
distilleries.tip: The 3 Gen Marsala Vergine Riserva is their flagship and reflects three generations of family craft.

distilleries.name: Averna Distillery and Museum
distilleries.description: Production site of Sicily's most iconic amaro; the recipe was gifted by Capuchin friars of the Santo Spirito Abbey to Salvatore Averna in 1868; museum, laboratory and factory tours by appointment covering the bitter botanical tradition.
distilleries.tip: Tours by appointment; call ahead on +39 0934 72111 or visit amaroaverna.com.

distilleries.name: Distilleria Fratelli Russo
distilleries.address: Via Duccio Galimberti 68, 95010 Santa Venerina (CT), Sicily
distilleries.description: Artisanal Etna distillery since 1870 in its fifth generation; produces Amaro di Sicilia, Limoncello, Arancello, Fuoco dell'Etna and grappas using volcanic-soil botanicals; guided tours from botanical garden to copper stills with tasting and mixology workshops.
distilleries.tip: The botanical garden walk before distillation tour is unique; book the mixology workshop for a hands-on session.

distilleries.name: Tenuta di Castellaro - Aeolian Fortified Wines
distilleries.description: Volcanic Aeolian Islands estate producing unique fortified and passito-style wines from ancient alberello Malvasia delle Lipari and Corinto Nero vines; sunset vineyard picnics with cellar visits.
distilleries.tip: The Malvasia Passito poured at sunset with panoramic sea views is one of Sicily's most atmospheric wine moments.

distilleries.name: Donnafugata Pantelleria - Passito di Pantelleria
distilleries.description: Donnafugata's Pantelleria estate producing the benchmark Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC from UNESCO-heritage Zibibbo alberello vines; fortified-wine-style visits with views of the sea and century-old vineyard.
spirits_produced: Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC
distilleries.tip: Open May-September; the Ben Ryé sotto le stelle evening experience at EUR 70 is the premium expression.

distilleries.name: Marco De Bartoli - Pantelleria Cellar
distilleries.description: Seasonal Pantelleria cellar producing the revered Bukkuram Passito di Pantelleria DOC; guided tours by reservation in summer covering Zibibbo sun-drying and the Bukkuram solera-method cellaring.
distilleries.tip: The Bukkuram cellar is open spring-summer only; contact info@marcodebartoli.com to reserve.
